pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Open Design is a local-first, web-deployable design product. It detects 16 installed code-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor Agent, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, etc.) and drives them with composable Skills and brand Design Systems to stream artifacts into a sandboxed preview. Falls back to an OpenAI-compatible BYOK proxy when no local CLI is available.
This ebuild builds the Electron desktop shell (apps/desktop) from source via pnpm + electron-builder, producing an AppImage that bundles the daemon, web runtime, and Electron 41 runtime.
